name: infinity
description: The AI-native database built for LLM applications, providing incredibly fast hybrid search of dense vector, sparse vector, tensor (multi-vector), and full-text.
summaryZh: The AI-native database built for LLM applications, providing incredibly fast hybrid search of dense vector, sparse vector, tensor (multi-vector), and full-text. 它更偏数据接入和知识增强，适合做企业检索、问答和私有数据助手。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做知识库问答、企业搜索和私有数据助手的产品团队。
